ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., XXS, XS, S, M, L) */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Description of the size (e.g., Extra Extra Small, Extra Small) */,
  "size_order" INTEGER /* Order of the size (e.g., 1 for XXS, 2 for XS, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversions" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "uk_size" INTEGER /* Size in UK */,
  "us_size" INTEGER /* Size in US */,
  "eu_it_size" INTEGER /* Size in EU/IT */,
  "au_size" INTEGER /* Size in Australia */,
  "jp_size" INTEGER /* Size in Japan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of measurements */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "bust" REAL /* Bust measurement in inches */,
  "natural_waist" REAL /* Natural waist measurement in inches */,
  "low_waist" REAL /* Low waist measurement in inches */,
  "hip" REAL /* Hip measurement in inches */,
  "overarm" REAL /* Overarm measurement in inches */,
  "inseam" REAL /* Inseam measurement in inches */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Sleeve length measurement in inches */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the brand */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the brand */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of the product (e.g., top, dress, pants) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the product (1-5) */,
  "reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of product measurements */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "bust" REAL /* Bust measurement in inches */,
  "natural_waist" REAL /* Natural waist measurement in inches */,
  "low_waist" REAL /* Low waist measurement in inches */,
  "hip" REAL /* Hip measurement in inches */,
  "overarm" REAL /* Overarm measurement in inches */,
  "inseam" REAL /* Inseam measurement in inches */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Sleeve length measurement in inches */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_measurements_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of customer measurements */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "bust" REAL /* Bust measurement in inches */,
  "natural_waist" REAL /* Natural waist measurement in inches */,
  "low_waist" REAL /* Low waist measurement in inches */,
  "hip" REAL /* Hip measurement in inches */,
  "overarm" REAL /* Overarm measurement in inches */,
  "inseam" REAL /* Inseam measurement in inches */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Sleeve length measurement in inches */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_measurements_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size recommendation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "recommended_size" TEXT /* Recommended size for the customer */,
  "date_recommended" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation was made */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the recommendation (0-1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer feedback */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "recommended_size" TEXT /* Recommended size for the customer */,
  "actual_fit" TEXT /* Actual fit of the product (e.g., too small, too large, perfect) */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product image */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_images_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
